cookiecutter.package_title: Live Vessel-Tracking Stream Client for AISStream.io
cookiecutter.description: A thin R client for the AISStream.io live vessel-tracking WebSocket feed, built on connectcore. Open one socket, subscribe with bounding boxes plus optional MMSI / message-type filters, and handle raw frames Node-ws style. Reconnect, re-subscribe, keepalive and a watchdog are inherited; parse helpers and an NDJSON recorder included.
